rationale: Gold memory is concentrated in price/volatility families, so test rate-liquidity regime shapes as an independent source.
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion
stop_conditions: no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
macro proxy does not add independent timing versus price-only anchors
rate-liquidity signal fails modern-era share accumulation
